svg.title: From Pain to Venture – Part 09 Reference Images
svg.desc: Reference images for Part 09: Market Hypothesis Map, Competitive Matrix, and Positioning Template.
svg.text: From Pain to Venture – Part 09 Reference Images
Five dimensions: Customer Segments · Market Scale · Competition ·
TAM is ambition. SOM is the first hill.
Axes: Higher relationship ownership × Higher operating complexity
Competitors: OTA · Booking Engine · CRM/Email · Hotel Chain Loyalty ·
Template: For ___, we are ___; unlike ___, we provide ___, because ___.
Positioning is not a slogan. It is a place in the customer's mind.
• A market is not large. It must also be reachable, identifiable, and convertible
• Competitors include manual work, Excel, consultants, and status quo
• Choose the right axes — the wrong axes make the matrix self-comforting
• Competitive advantage: doing something others cannot fully copy
Source: Strategyzer, Geoffrey Moore Crossing the Chasm
